name: Mixed Cajun Spices, Borrowed from Chef Paul
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix together the following spices for fish: 6 salt, 1 red pepper, 4 black pepper, 4 white pepper, 4 onion powder, 4 garlic powder, 2 thyme, 1 oregano.
2. Mix together the following spices for beef: 6 salt, 2 red pepper, 4 black pepper, 3 white pepper, 4 onion powder, 2 garlic powder, 2 thyme, 1 oregano.
3. Mix together the following spices for chicken: 6 salt, 2 red pepper, 3 black pepper, 4 white pepper, 4 onion powder, 2 garlic powder, 1 thyme, 1 oregano.
4. Combine all the mixed spice proportions in a labeled spice jar. The amounts given will fill a Spice Island or McCormick gourmet jar if measured in tablespoons.
